services.llm_usage_prompt: To use EruditePay XRP: Verify, call https://bridge.eruditepay.com/v1/xrp/tx/verify with x402 payment of 0.03 USDC. Send json input. Returns json. Description: Verify an XRP x402 payment payload — signed transaction check with 14 security verifications
services.sdk_snippet_python:
import requests
# Call EruditePay XRP: Verify
resp = requests.get("https://bridge.eruditepay.com/v1/xrp/tx/verify")
# Returns 402 with payment info: 30000 USDC micro-units
